project.name: voxlblade-builder
project.description: Svelte 5 + Vite + TypeScript damage calculator for Voxel Blade RPG with weapon calculations, enchantments, perks, and draconic rune system

nodes.name: src/lib/types.ts
nodes.summary: Core type definitions, interfaces, and constants for the entire damage calculator. Defines stat system, equipment types, weapon types, build state, and proc mechanics.

nodes.name: StatKey
nodes.summary: Union type of all stat attribute names (e.g. physicalBoost, warding, protection, tenacity)

nodes.name: StatMap
nodes.summary: Partial record mapping StatKey to number values; the universal stat container used everywhere

nodes.name: PERCENT_STATS
nodes.summary: Set of stat keys that are displayed/rounded as percentages

nodes.name: STAT_KEYS
nodes.summary: Array of all StatKey values for iteration

nodes.name: applyUpgrade
nodes.summary: Applies upgrade level multiplier to a StatMap (positive stats multiplied, negative divided)

nodes.name: Race
nodes.summary: Player race with passive, stat modifiers, cooldown modifiers, and armor penetration

nodes.name: Guild
nodes.summary: Player guild containing ranked progression with stat/perk rewards

nodes.name: GuildRank
nodes.summary: A rank within a guild, with stats and perks

nodes.name: Armor
nodes.summary: Armor definition with three parts (helmet/chest/leggings), each with stats and perks

nodes.name: ArmorPart
nodes.summary: Individual piece of armor with type, stats, upgrade, and perk

nodes.name: Ring
nodes.summary: Ring equipment with stats, upgrade, and optional perk

nodes.name: Rune
nodes.summary: Rune equipment with stats, cooldown, upgrade, and optional perk

nodes.name: Enchantment
nodes.summary: Enchantment definition with stats, effects, stacking rules, and category

nodes.name: WeaponBlade
nodes.summary: Blade component of a weapon with tier, stats, scaling, and optional perks

nodes.name: WeaponHandle
nodes.summary: Handle component of a weapon with tier, stats, scaling, and optional perks

nodes.name: MonkGlove
nodes.summary: Monk glove with damage types, scaling, and perk

nodes.name: MonkEssence
nodes.summary: Monk essence with scaling values and perk

nodes.name: BuildState
nodes.summary: Complete build configuration: race, guild, equipment selections, enchantments, upgrades, weapon art, combat state, and toggles

nodes.name: ProcCoefficient
nodes.summary: Discriminated union: either noProc or hasCoeff with numeric value

nodes.name: getProcCoeffValue
nodes.summary: Extracts numeric proc coefficient (0 for noProc, value for hasCoeff, 1 for undefined)

nodes.name: canProc
nodes.summary: Returns true if proc coefficient allows proccing (> 0)

nodes.name: SCALING_TO_BOOST
nodes.summary: Maps stat prefix names (physical, magic, etc.) to their corresponding boost stat keys

nodes.name: WeaponBaseDmg
nodes.summary: Weapon attack pattern: m1/m2 hit arrays, finisher flag, and optional m2 charge mechanic

nodes.name: BoostEntry
nodes.summary: Single damage/heal boost with source, multiplier, condition, and proc rules

nodes.name: EnchantSlot
nodes.summary: Union of enchantment slot names: helmet, chestplate, leggings, ring, rune

nodes.name: src/lib/utils.ts
nodes.summary: Pure utility functions: multiplier math, warding debuff calc, HTML text highlighting for search, and proc chance calculation.

nodes.name: roundMultiplier
nodes.summary: Rounds a multiplier to 4 decimal places

nodes.name: calcWardingDebuffMultiplier
nodes.summary: Converts warding stat to damage multiplier (divides for positive, subtracts for negative)

nodes.name: highlightTextParts
nodes.summary: Splits text into highlighted/non-highlighted segments for search result rendering

nodes.name: calcProcChance
nodes.summary: Computes actual proc chance from base chance, proc coefficient, and scaling type

nodes.name: src/lib/dmgTypes.ts
nodes.summary: Damage type data structures: badge UI config, computed type/hit interfaces for the damage calculation pipeline output.

nodes.name: BADGE_CONFIG
nodes.summary: UI badge definitions for proc effects (Dragon State, Spore Burst, Chain, Luminescent, Explosive, etc.) with colors and tooltips

nodes.name: ComputedType
nodes.summary: Fully computed single damage type row: base, scalings, boosts, defense, raw/crit values, healing flag

nodes.name: PerkOnHitDmg
nodes.summary: Damage entry for a perk-triggered on-hit effect: damage types, proc rules, finisher/proc flags

nodes.name: ComputedHit
nodes.summary: A complete hit in the damage pipeline: group, index, count, finisher flag, and array of ComputedType rows

nodes.name: src/lib/damageTypeResolve.ts
nodes.summary: Damage type resolution logic: merges base types with bonuses, resolves weapon art type selection, applies Fire/Air and Air/Magic conversions.

nodes.name: resolveDamageTypes
nodes.summary: Merges bonus damage types onto base types, rounding each to 4 decimals

nodes.name: applyFireAirConversion
nodes.summary: Converts 50% of Fire<->Air damage (Echo Incineration mechanic)

nodes.name: resolveWaDamageTypeKeys
nodes.summary: Resolves weapon art damage type from selection string: 'Same as weapon', 'Highest damage type', or parsed custom types

nodes.name: getFinalWaDmgTypes
nodes.summary: Combines resolveWaDamageTypeKeys + resolveDamageTypes to get final weapon art damage types

nodes.name: applyAirToMagicConversion
nodes.summary: Converts Air->Magic (Spirit Winds), then applies Fire/Air conversion (Echo), then Dark Magic hex bonus

nodes.name: src/data/statboost.ts
nodes.summary: Stat boost perk processing: a registry of 16 perk handlers that mutate StatMap values based on cross-stat interactions (e.g. Quick Witted converts speed to dex). Processes perks in fixed execution order.

nodes.name: OFFENSIVE_BOOSTS
nodes.summary: List of offensive boost stat keys used by Brawny perk

nodes.name: PERK_REGISTRY
nodes.summary: Map of perk name to handler function; each handler mutates a StatMap based on the perk's mechanic

nodes.name: applyStatBoostPerks
nodes.summary: Main entry: takes stats + perks, runs all perk handlers in execution order, returns rounded result

nodes.name: src/lib/engine/data/character.ts
nodes.summary: Character data access layer: loads races, guilds, and perks from JSON, provides lookup functions by name.

nodes.name: getRace
nodes.summary: Lookup race by name

nodes.name: getGuild
nodes.summary: Lookup guild by name

nodes.name: getPerk
nodes.summary: Lookup perk by name

nodes.name: getGuildRank
nodes.summary: Lookup specific rank within a guild

nodes.name: isMonkGuild
nodes.summary: Returns true if guild name is 'Monk'

nodes.name: src/lib/engine/data/equipment.ts
nodes.summary: Equipment data access layer: loads armors, rings, runes, enchantments from JSON with merged armor part data. Provides lookup functions.

nodes.name: getEnchant
nodes.summary: Lookup enchantment by name

nodes.name: getRing
nodes.summary: Lookup ring by name

nodes.name: getRune
nodes.summary: Lookup rune by name

nodes.name: getArmorPart
nodes.summary: Lookup a specific armor part (helmet/chest/leggings) within an armor set

nodes.name: src/lib/engine/data/weapons.ts
nodes.summary: Weapon data access layer: loads blades, handles, gloves, essences from JSON. Provides name-based lookup functions.

nodes.name: getBlade
nodes.summary: Lookup weapon blade by name

nodes.name: getHandle
nodes.summary: Lookup weapon handle by name

nodes.name: getGlove
nodes.summary: Lookup monk glove by name

nodes.name: getEssence
nodes.summary: Lookup monk essence by name

nodes.name: src/lib/engine/format.ts
nodes.summary: Display formatting helpers: formats stat values with +/- sign and % suffix, converts camelCase keys to readable labels.

nodes.name: formatStat
nodes.summary: Formats a stat value as +/-N or +/-N% for display

nodes.name: formatLabel
nodes.summary: Converts camelCase stat key to human-readable label (e.g. 'physicalBoost' -> 'Physical Boost')

nodes.name: src/lib/store.ts
nodes.summary: Svelte writable store for build state with localStorage persistence, derived computation store, and mutation helpers.

nodes.name: build
nodes.summary: Svelte writable store holding the current BuildState, persisted to localStorage with debounce

nodes.name: result
nodes.summary: Svelte derived store that computes damage results from the build state via calcBuild

nodes.name: setEnchantment
nodes.summary: Updates a specific enchantment slot index with a value, enforcing slot rules

nodes.name: clearBuild
nodes.summary: Resets build state to defaults

nodes.name: setGuild
nodes.summary: Sets guild and rank, auto-switching race to DRAGON BLOODED for Draconic guild

nodes.name: UPGRADE_MAX
nodes.summary: Maximum upgrade level (5)

nodes.name: DMG_TYPE_COLORS
nodes.summary: Re-export: color map for damage types

nodes.name: DMG_TYPE_PRIORITY
nodes.summary: Re-export: tiebreaker priority order for damage types

nodes.name: .fallowrc.json
nodes.summary: Configuration for the Fallow dead-code analysis tool. Defines entry points (src/index.*, src/main.*), duplicate detection with minOccurrences=3, rules for unused-dependencies as warnings, and ignoreExports entries for Svelte modal components and constant files that are intentionally exported but statically unreachable.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Agent context file for the voxlblade-builder project. Documents the project as a web-based damage calculator for the Roblox game Voxel Blade, built with Svelte 5, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Vitest, ESLint, Prettier, and pnpm. Describes the project structure, development workflow, and AI agent interaction guidelines.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Standard Svelte + TypeScript + Vite template README. Covers recommended IDE setup (VS Code + Svelte extension), explains why this template is used over SvelteKit, discusses technical decisions around global.d.ts, allowJs, HMR state preservation, and VS Code extension recommendations.

nodes.name: fallow-output.json
nodes.summary: Fallow dead-code analysis output for the voxlblade-builder project. Reports 28 total issues: 1 unused file (svelte.config.js), 23 unused exports across src/data/*, src/lib/engine.ts, src/lib/defense.ts, src/lib/types.ts, and src/lib/utils.ts, 2 unused types (SummonDef, SummonPerkMode in SummonData.ts), and 2 duplicate exports (modalSearch, value). Includes next_steps recommendations for trace, audit, and schema setup.

nodes.name: fallow-security.json
nodes.summary: Fallow security analysis output for the voxlblade-builder project. Reports 25 security findings, all low severity tainted-sink issues: dangerous-html (CWE-79) via template.innerHTML assignments in App.svelte (22 findings), DidYouMean.svelte (1 finding), and SuggestDrop.svelte (1 finding), plus 1 dynamic-regex (CWE-1333) via new RegExp() in App.svelte. Also reports 250 unresolved callee sites, primarily from dynamic dispatch (233) and computed member access (17), with top files being DamageAnalyzer.svelte and App.svelte.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Root HTML entry point for the Vite-based Svelte application. Minimal HTML5 document with charset, viewport meta tags, a title 'VoxlBlade Builder', a single div#app mount point, and a module script tag loading /src/main.ts.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Project package manifest for the 'voxlblade' package. Defines scripts for dev (vite), build (vite build), preview (vite preview), and check (svelte-check + tsc). Dev dependencies include @sveltejs/vite-plugin-svelte ^7, svelte ^5.55, vite ^8, typescript ~6, eslint ^10.5, fallow ^2.104, playwright ^1.61, svelte-check ^4.4, and vite-plugin-pwa ^1.3. Runtime dependency: @vercel/analytics ^2.

nodes.name: tsconfig.app.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript configuration for the application source code. Extends @tsconfig/svelte, targets ES2023 with ESNext modules, includes svelte and vite/client types, enables allowJs and checkJs for .svelte and .js file type-checking, and includes all .ts, .js, and .svelte files under src/.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: Root TypeScript configuration. Simply extends tsconfig.app.json to serve as the default project config for editors and tools.

nodes.name: tsconfig.node.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript configuration for Node.js tooling files (vite.config.ts). Targets ES2023, uses bundler module resolution, enables verbatimModuleSyntax, noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, erasableSyntaxOnly, and noFallthroughCasesInSwitch. Scoped to vite.config.ts only.

nodes.name: vercel.json
nodes.summary: Vercel deployment configuration for the voxlblade-builder project. Sets build command to 'npm run build', output directory to 'dist', framework to 'vite'. Configures Cache-Control headers: immutable long-cache for /assets/*, must-revalidate for /sw.js (service worker) and /index.html.

nodes.name: decode_full.mjs
nodes.summary: Standalone debug/test tool that decodes and computes a full Voxel Blade character build offline. Loads JSON data files (armors, rings, runes, blades, handles, races, guilds, enchantments, perks), applies upgrades, enchantments, shrine multipliers, and infusions, then prints accumulated stats and final perks. Duplicates core engine logic for standalone debugging.

nodes.name: getPerk
nodes.summary: Looks up a perk definition by name from the pre-built PERK_MAP.

nodes.name: getArmorPart
nodes.summary: Retrieves a specific armor part (Helmet/Chestplate/Leggings) by armor name and part type from the pre-built ARMOR_MAP.

nodes.name: applyUpgrade
nodes.summary: Applies an upgrade level multiplier (1 + level * 0.1) to positive stats (multiplicative) and negative stats (divisive), with armor penetration excluded from upgrade scaling.

nodes.name: applyEnchantmentsToSlot
nodes.summary: Applies enchantment modifiers to a slot's base stats and perks in reverse order. Handles multiplier and additive modifiers, base stats scaling, upgrade application, bonus multipliers, and perk modifications from enchantments.

nodes.name: applyShrine
nodes.summary: Applies shrine tier multiplier (T1Ă—3.0, T2Ă—1.7, T3Ă—1.4, T4Ă—1.1, T5Ă—1.0) to weapon stats.

nodes.name: applyInfusion
nodes.summary: Applies infusion by halving all base stats (Ă—0.5 multiplier).

nodes.name: finalizePerks
nodes.summary: Post-processes raw perks: applies Perk Effectiveness and Cursed multipliers with exemptions, converts Buckler to Parry, and propagates potency tags (Bleed/Burn/Poison Potency).

nodes.name: ONBOARDING.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive onboarding guide for the voxlblade project. Documents project overview, architecture layers (Root Config, Source Root, Data Layer, Library Layer, Constants Layer, Engine Layer, Modals Layer, Statistics Layer, Stores Layer), key concepts (damage calculation pipeline, buff/debuff system, engine architecture, state management, component hierarchy), guided tour steps, file map, and complexity hotspots.

nodes.name: app.css
nodes.summary: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties (design tokens) for the dark-themed UI. Includes color palette (bg, surface, accent, neg, weapon-specific colors), spacing scale (4px base), border radii, shadows, duration/easing, font sizes/weights, letter spacing, z-index layers, Draconic theme tokens, scrollbar styling, and component styles for weapon art and wild bolt UI boxes.

nodes.name: App.svelte
nodes.summary: Root Svelte component (~3732 lines) orchestrating the entire application UI. Manages build state, modal system (race/guild/armor/ring/rune/blade/handle/glove/essence selection), enchant management, weapon art selection and validation, draconic rune system, upgrade cycling, build clear/undo, stat filtering, perk tag filtering, detail card rendering, weapon stat display, and summary grid. Integrates with all major subsystems: engine, store, data modules, and child components.

nodes.name: toggleCdrPerk
nodes.summary: Toggles a CDR perk on/off in the build state's cdrToggles map.

nodes.name: handleClearBuild
nodes.summary: Clears the entire build state with undo support. Stores the previous build state and sets a timeout to auto-dismiss the undo option.

nodes.name: handleUndo
nodes.summary: Restores the previously cleared build state and cancels the auto-dismiss timer.

nodes.name: toggleUpgrade
nodes.summary: Cycles an equipment upgrade level (0-5) for a given upgrade key.

nodes.name: computeArmorEffectiveBoost
nodes.summary: Computes the effective armor boost contribution by multiplying armor stats by weapon scaling values, used for 'most-effective' sort mode.

nodes.name: computeArmorBrawnyEffectiveBoost
nodes.summary: Computes effective armor boost with Brawny perk conversion (converts non-physical offensive boosts to physicalBoost before calculating).

nodes.name: weaponMatchesFilter
nodes.summary: Checks if a weapon item matches the current weapon stat filter criteria (include/exclude map).

nodes.name: substringLevenshtein
nodes.summary: Computes Levenshtein distance between a query and candidate string, returning 0 if the candidate contains the query substring.

nodes.name: filterAccessoryItems
nodes.summary: Filters accessory items (rings/runes) by search query, perk tags, stat filter, and sorts by effective boost or stat filter mode.

nodes.name: filterWeaponItems
nodes.summary: Filters weapon items by search query, perk tags, weapon stat filter, and sorts by stat filter mode.

nodes.name: buildSlotCard
nodes.summary: Builds a DetailCard for an equipment slot by applying enchantments to base stats/perks.

nodes.name: buildInfusionCard
nodes.summary: Builds a DetailCard for an infusion slot by applying infusion modifier (50% stat scaling).

nodes.name: applySuggestion
nodes.summary: Applies a modal search suggestion by updating the appropriate build state field based on active modal type, or prefills the search box.

nodes.name: splitWeaponStats
nodes.summary: Splits weapon stats into damage types, scalings, and boosts categories.

nodes.name: formatCD
nodes.summary: Formats a cooldown value with CDR applied, showing the final seconds.

nodes.name: BaseDamageCalc.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component (~2502 lines) that computes and displays per-hit damage breakdowns. Handles weapon hit calculations, critical hit multipliers, debuff damage multipliers, defense/armor penetration, typed damage boosts, DoT ticks, healing calculations, daily challenge presets, and tooltip formulas. Accepts extensive props for boosts, crit, stats, debuffs, self-damage, draconic bonuses, and more.

nodes.name: calcArmorMult
nodes.summary: Calculates the armor mitigation multiplier using two branches: low (def â‰¤ pen + threshold) applies linear reduction, high (def > pen + threshold) applies diminishing-returns formula. Returns the multiplier and which branch was used.

nodes.name: getApplicableBoosts
nodes.summary: Returns the list of typed damage boosts that apply to a given damage type, considering heal vs damage mode, weapon group, and proc coefficient requirements.

nodes.name: defPctForType
nodes.summary: Resolves the effective defense percentage for a damage type, including inherited defenses from parent types. True and summon types have 0 defense.

nodes.name: computePreMitigationBase
nodes.summary: Computes pre-mitigation base damage by summing base damage Ă— damage type multipliers, then applying scaling and combat multipliers.

nodes.name: loadDefenses
nodes.summary: Loads enemy defense values from localStorage, defaulting all tracked types to 0.

nodes.name: resolveTypeInfo
nodes.summary: Resolves complete damage type information including applicable boosts, typed multiplier, debuff multiplier, defense percentage, and armor multiplier for a given type.

nodes.name: BuffList.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component (~743 lines) displaying active buffs, debuffs, and neutral effects with source tracking. Computes buff sources from items, perks, weapon arts, draconic infusion, and auto-debuffs. Groups duplicate buffs showing strongest entry, displays potency values, duration, source breakdowns with bar charts, and handles Dragonic infusion color-specific potency/duration modifiers for hex and holy.

nodes.name: BuildSaves.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component (~608 lines) managing build save/load functionality with localStorage persistence. Supports multiple save slots with rename, confirm-to-load, confirm-to-delete, export/import via compressed base64 codes (deflate-raw), clipboard paste, and responsive mobile sheet UI. Implements prototype pollution protection on import.

nodes.name: encodeState
nodes.summary: Encodes a BuildState into a compressed base64 share code. Strips default values, shortens keys via KEY_MAP/ENCH_MAP, and compresses with deflate-raw.

nodes.name: decodeState
nodes.summary: Decodes a compressed base64 share code back into a BuildState. Handles both compressed and legacy base64 formats, validates fields via sanitizeField, and protects against prototype pollution.

nodes.name: sanitizeField
nodes.summary: Validates and sanitizes a single field from imported data against expected types from DEFAULTS, filtering dangerous keys (__proto__, constructor, prototype).

nodes.name: CdrStepsCalc.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component displaying step-by-step cooldown reduction (CDR) calculation. Shows each multiplier step with before/after values, floor operation, and minimum CD cap (1s). Supports optional set-bonus override display.

nodes.name: CritIcon.svelte
nodes.summary: Simple SVG component rendering a critical hit icon (star/bolt shape) with a red-to-orange gradient. Accepts a size prop.

nodes.name: DamageAnalyzer.svelte
nodes.summary: Primary damage analysis Svelte component (~6665 lines). Core of the application computing the full damage pipeline: assembles active buffs, calculates typed damage boosts, defense sources, heal scaling, debuff combat effects, DoT ticks, self-damage, weapon art damage, summon stats, draconic bonuses, enemy HP effects, and perk-on-hit damages. Renders detailed damage breakdowns with tooltips, critical hit toggles, defense presets, and mount rune support.

nodes.name: cdr.ts
nodes.summary: Defines cooldown reduction (CDR) perk data mapping. Each entry specifies rune/WA CDR percentages or multipliers, optional set-CD overrides, toggleability, and filter conditions. Includes: Caster, Channeled Weapon, Mage Rage, Poison Acceleration, Runic Winds, Wave Rider, Whirlwind, Gladiatorial Rage, and Voltaic Body.

nodes.name: debuffCombatEffects.ts
nodes.summary: Defines combat effects for debuffs: Weakness (damage reduction), Shatter/Despair/Electrical Rend (armor reduction), Sticky/Sticky variants (movement slow + type damage taken increase), Frostbite (water+air damage taken). Each entry has a description function, optional damage multiplier, defense reduction, and type-specific damage multipliers.

nodes.name: defensivePerks.ts
nodes.summary: Defines defensive perk damage reduction sources. Each perk specifies DR per stack, max DR, flat vs diminishing, conditional activation (HP thresholds, mounted, rage, darkness, protection), and potency capping. Exports getActiveDefensivePerkSources() and calcDefensivePotencyMult() (with Bastion Bless and Draconic Holy infusion).

nodes.name: getActiveDefensivePerkSources
nodes.summary: Returns active defensive perk sources based on current build context (HP, triggered states, darkness, rage, mounted, protection, debuff count). Applies conditional checks and computes DR per source.

nodes.name: calcDefensivePotencyMult
nodes.summary: Calculates the defensive potency multiplier from Bastion Bless stacks and Draconic Holy infusion bonus.

nodes.name: DoTDamage.ts
nodes.summary: Damage-over-time calculation module. Defines DoT type list (Bleed, Burn, Poison), stat scalings per type, damage type mappings, and functions for computing tick damage: getDotBase (base damage formula), getDotPotencyMult (potency power scaling with cap), calcDotTick (full tick calculation), calcCausticSlow (Poison+Slow synergy), toGamePotency (builder-to-game value conversion), and calcDotDisplayPotency (with Endless Despair modifier).

nodes.name: calcDotTick
nodes.summary: Computes a single DoT tick damage value using base damage formula and potency multiplier.

nodes.name: calcDotDisplayPotency
nodes.summary: Computes effective DoT display potency, applying Endless Despair modifier (Ă—(1+0.35Ă—ED) +0.1) when ED stacks > 0.

nodes.name: calcCausticSlow
nodes.summary: Calculates Caustic Slow damage using Poison Potency with a bonus multiplier from enemy Slow debuff duration.

nodes.name: draconicColorEffects.ts
nodes.summary: Defines Draconic color-based attack stat modifiers for 6 colors (fire/red, air/white, earth/green, water/blue, holy/yellow, hex/purple). Each color specifies damage multiplier, speed multiplier, knockback, cooldown reduction, stun multiplier, and special effects (burn, weakness, heals). Exports DRACONIC_COLOR_ATTACK_STATS array and getDraconicColorDmgMultiplier().

nodes.name: getDraconicColorDmgMultiplier
nodes.summary: Returns the damage multiplier for a given draconic color, defaulting to 1 for unknown colors.

nodes.name: draconicRunes.ts
nodes.summary: Implements Draconic rune bonus calculations. Applies flat 5% per stack bonus to a color-specific damage type, and Dragon Infusion buff potency bonus. Exports applyDraconicBonuses() and getDraconicBonuses() combining both rune and infusion bonuses.

nodes.name: applyDraconicBonuses
nodes.summary: Applies both Draconic rune stacks bonus and Dragon Infusion bonus to damage type multipliers.

nodes.name: getDraconicBonuses
nodes.summary: Returns combined Draconic rune and Dragon Infusion bonuses as a damage type â†’ bonus map.

nodes.name: enemyHpEffects.ts
nodes.summary: Defines enemy HP-gated effects. Contains EnemyHpGate interface for above/below threshold checks, EnemyHpEffectDef for perk-triggered effects (currently Mycotic Bloom: Slowness debuff above 50% HP, Poison damage boost below 50% HP). Exports isEnemyHpGateActive(), getActiveEnemyHpDebuffs(), and getEnemyHpDotMultiplier().

nodes.name: getEnemyHpDotMultiplier
nodes.summary: Returns the multiplicative DoT boost for a given dot type based on active enemy HP-gated effects.

nodes.name: mountRunes.ts
nodes.summary: Defines mount rune attack data for 3 mounts: Winter Woof, Slizard, and Glacial Snapper. Each provides M1 (basic attack) and WA (weapon art) definitions with base damage, damage types, stat scalings, healing, guardbreak, cooldown, and secondary effects. Exports MOUNT_RUNE_DEFS array.

nodes.name: Perkbasedmg.ts
nodes.summary: Central perk-based damage definitions module (~733 lines). Defines PerkDmgDef structures with base damage formulas, scaling multipliers, combat multipliers, damage types, secondary effects, and HP gates for 40+ perks. Exports PERK_DMG_DEFS array, gateThreshold(), isHpGateActive(), DRAGON_STATE_HP_GATE, BELLOWING_EMBER_HP_GATE, SECONDARY_TONE_COLORS, and calcSpringblastBaseDamage().

nodes.name: gateThreshold
nodes.summary: Computes the effective HP threshold for a perk gate, considering dynamic thresholds and always-active perk amounts.

nodes.name: isHpGateActive
nodes.summary: Checks if an HP gate condition is met given current HP fill percentage and perk amount.

nodes.name: calcSpringblastBaseDamage
nodes.summary: Calculates Springblast perk base damage using a formula with per-stack scaling and half-denominator reduction.

nodes.name: procCoefficients.ts
nodes.summary: Defines proc coefficient data for all weapon types (M1/M2), weapon arts, runes, and perks. Each entry uses ProcCoefficient type with either 'hasCoeff' (value 0-1) or 'noProc'. Covers ~30 weapon types, 5 WAs, 1 rune, and 3 perks. Exports WEAPON_PROC_COEFFS, WA_PROC_COEFFS, RUNE_PROC_COEFFS, PERK_PROC_COEFFS, DEFAULT_PROC_COEFF, and DEFAULT_RUNE_PROC_COEFF.

nodes.name: raceEffects.ts
nodes.summary: Defines race-conditional effects and Ork tenacity bonus. Currently implements Human race (below 50% HP: +20% damage boost, flat 20% DR) and Ork tenacity (+0.1 tenacity per non-debuff/non-neutral buff). Exports getActiveRaceEffect(), getOrkTenacityBuffs(), and calcOrkTenacityBonus().

nodes.name: getActiveRaceEffect
nodes.summary: Returns the active race conditional effect for a given race and HP fill percentage.

nodes.name: calcOrkTenacityBonus
nodes.summary: Calculates the Ork tenacity bonus: +0.1 tenacity per active non-debuff/non-neutral buff.

nodes.name: selfDamagePerks.ts
nodes.summary: Defines self-damage perk mechanics. Covers Undead Might (hex+earth self-damage with DR), Explosive Charge (fire+physical), Dark Magic (hex), and Bombardier (magic+holy). Implements multi-target harmonic series falloff and per-type defense mitigation. Exports SELF_DAMAGE_PERK_DEFS, calcSelfDamage(), and constants.

nodes.name: calcSelfDamage
nodes.summary: Calculates self-damage from a perk, applying DR multiplier, multi-target harmonic falloff, and per-type defense. Returns total and per-type breakdown.

nodes.name: stanceOverlays.ts
nodes.summary: Resolves weapon stance overlays based on equipped perks and weapon type. Blaster Ring transforms fistsâ†’Rifle or weaponâ†’Shotgun, Locked And Loaded transforms fistsâ†’Dual Guns or weaponâ†’Side Gun, Cosmic Ray and Mine perks override M2 type. Exports resolveStanceOverlay().

nodes.name: resolveStanceOverlay
nodes.summary: Resolves the active stance overlay by checking conditions in priority order, returning the first match or null.

nodes.name: weapon base dmg.ts
nodes.summary: Defines base damage values for all ~30 weapon types. Each entry specifies M1 and M2 hit damage as arrays of numbers or {n, count} multi-hit objects. Includes special types: m1Finisher flag, m2Charge for Rifle with charge-based scaling formula. Exports WEAPON_BASE_DMG array.

nodes.name: Weaponartcheck.ts
nodes.summary: Weapon Art validation module. Checks if a weapon art's requirements are met given current weapon scalings, stats, weapon type, guild, and equipped parts. Handles scaling requirements, stat requirements, at-least-one-scaling conditions, scaling-exempt weapon types, and specific part requirements. Exports checkWA() and getUnmetReqs().

nodes.name: checkWA
nodes.summary: Validates whether a weapon art's requirements are met for the current build. Checks guild, weapon type, scaling thresholds, stat requirements, part requirements, and scaling-exempt weapon types.

nodes.name: getUnmetReqs
nodes.summary: Returns a list of unmet requirement descriptions for a weapon art, used to display why a WA is unavailable.

nodes.name: weaponArts.ts
nodes.summary: Defines weapon art data for Voxel Blade including interfaces (WAIndividualHit, WeaponArtRequirement, WeaponArt) and the WEAPON_ARTS array containing 40+ weapon abilities with damage formulas, cooldowns, scaling requirements, and hit configurations.

nodes.name: WAIndividualHit
nodes.summary: Interface defining a single hit within a weapon art: damageType, optional scaling, isFinisher and isCrit flags.

nodes.name: WeaponArtRequirement
nodes.summary: Interface defining stat/scaling requirements for equipping a weapon art: physical/magic/fire/water/earth/air/hex/holy/dexterity/summon scaling thresholds, defense/boost requirements, weapon type and guild restrictions.

nodes.name: WeaponArt
nodes.summary: Interface for a complete weapon art definition: name, description, cooldown, baseDamage, damageType, hit array, scaling, extras, requirements, category, and optional hit-specific damage types/scalings.

nodes.name: WEAPON_ARTS
nodes.summary: Array of 40+ weapon art objects covering physical (Lunge, Spin, Slam), magic (Laser, Mines, Mage Bomb), elemental (Flame Slash, Waterfall, Earthquake), holy (Holy Phalanx, Holy Shrine), hex (Cursed Ground, Jinx, Dark Tentacle), summon (Mage Bomber, Blessedlings), and monk (Barrage, Shatter, Focus) abilities.

nodes.name: weaponConditionalBoosts.ts
nodes.summary: Defines weapon-conditional perk boosts that apply multiplier bonuses only for specific weapon types on specific hit scopes (M1 finisher, M2). Contains the Aggressive Personality perk logic for War Hammer/Dual Mallets/Mallet.

nodes.name: getWeaponConditionalBoost
nodes.summary: Calculates conditional perk multipliers based on active perks, weapon type, and hit scope. Returns combined multiplier and labels of matching perks.

nodes.name: DidYouMean.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component displaying 'Did you mean?' suggestion chips when search has no exact results. Shows highlighted text matches and differentiates perk vs name suggestions with distinct styling.

nodes.name: DmgTotalTooltip.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte 5 component rendering a damage breakdown tooltip with an animated SVG pie chart showing damage type distribution. Groups ComputedHit types by damage key, calculates totals with crit/non-crit values, and displays percentage breakdowns with badge indicators.

nodes.name: DraconicAbilityStats.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component displaying draconic ability stat rows: damage type with color, scaling, poise damage, and optional holy/water healing values with cleanses note.

nodes.name: EmotionalTracker.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component for the Emotional State selector allowing users to toggle between buff-only, debuff-only, or both modes. Features button selectors, a slider with segmented track, and dot indicators with color-coded styling (green=buff, red=debuff, purple=both). Persists state to the build store.

nodes.name: Highlight.svelte
nodes.summary: Simple Svelte component that renders text with search query matches highlighted using <mark> tags via highlightTextParts utility.

nodes.name: LevelBar.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component rendering an interactive level/HP bar with: editable level input, draggable HP fill slider, protection-based shield overlay and lost-HP zone, color-coded health states, threshold line marker, and localStorage persistence for level and HP fill values.

nodes.name: AppHeader.svelte
nodes.summary: Svelte component for the application header with animated tab switcher (Overview/Analyze), app title 'VoxlBuilder', usage hint text, and integrated BuildSaves component. Features CSS-animated sliding bubble indicator for active tab.

nodes.name: constants.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-export module that re-exports everything from the constants/index sub-directory.

nodes.name: boosts.ts
nodes.summary: Defines multiplier-per-stack constants for combat boost perks including Blood Thirsty, Venom Spitter, Perfection, Stealth, Golden Crits, Royal Parry, Spell Piercer, Scourge, Sharpshooter, Valor, Gorecast, Undead Might, Highlander, Emotional, Heal Boost, Ocean's Rage, and complex boosts like Spirit Winds, Guardian Spin, Quickdraw, Vampire, and Toxin Caster.

nodes.name: cdr.ts
nodes.summary: Cooldown reduction (CDR) constants for various perks: Caster Rune/WA, Channeled Weapon, Mage Rage, Poison Acceleration, Runic Winds, Wave Rider, Whirlwind, Gladiatorial set, and Voltaic Body multiplier.

nodes.name: damage-types.ts
nodes.summary: Core damage type definitions: DMG_TYPE_META with labels and hex colors for 11 types (physical, magic, fire, water, earth, air, hex, holy, true, summon, heal), defense inheritance mapping, physical/magic inherited type sets, damage type priority ordering, and type collection arrays.

nodes.name: debuff-effects.ts
nodes.summary: Debuff combat effect constants: weakness formula base, defense conversion rate, Sticky damage multiplier, and Despair display/damage coefficients.

nodes.name: defensive.ts
nodes.summary: Defensive perk damage reduction values: BarbSkin, StoneSkin (with max DR cap), Adaptive Plate, Protector Spirit (with HP threshold and always-on stack), Air Pressure, Valor Shield, Vampire, Frenzy (negative DR), Stored Corruption, Mounted Defense, Carapace, and Cursed Bark DR per debuff.

nodes.name: dot-damage.ts
nodes.summary: Damage-over-time constants: base DoT damage (1.75), infliction divisor, scaling rates for Bleed (Dex/Phys), Burn (Fire), Poison (Hex/Earth), Caustic (Hex/Earth), potency power, rounding, builder-to-game conversion, and slow multiplier per second.

nodes.name: draconic-colors.ts
nodes.summary: Draconic color variant multipliers: Fire (speed), Air (speed, knockback, cooldown), Earth (damage, speed, stun), Water (damage, speed, stun), and Hex (stun, random debuff chances).

nodes.name: draconic.ts
nodes.summary: Draconic system constants: infusion potency/duration multipliers, Dragon State HP base and per-stack values, Dragon State multiplier, and Bastion Bless multiplier.

nodes.name: calcBaseMaxHP
nodes.summary: Calculates base max HP from level using formula: round(120 * (1 + level * 0.0125)).

nodes.name: game.ts
nodes.summary: Core game constants: MAX_LEVEL (80), DEFAULT_LEVEL, HP configuration (BASE_HP=120, HP_PER_LEVEL=0.0125), calcBaseMaxHP function, and UI timing constants (save debounce, undo window, search blur, import success display, focus delay, toast duration).

nodes.name: heals.ts
nodes.summary: Healing constants: crit healing base (120), holy boost divisor, crit healing per stack, and Ocean's Song per-stack multiplier.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-export module aggregating all constants sub-modules: damage-types, game, storage, thresholds, perks, boosts, heals, draconic, perk-base-damage, rune-base-damage, buffs, stat-conversions, defensive, dot-damage, draconic-colors, cdr, debuff-effects.

nodes.name: perk-base-damage.ts
nodes.summary: Perk-triggered base damage constants for 20+ perks: Dragon Claw/Bubble (damage, heal, poise), Springblast, Basic/Buni/Mageling/Toadzerker/Dire Buni/Void Root Spirit, Bounce Momentum, Protector Spirit, Air Pressure/Barrier, Roaring Heads, Barbed Flurry, Honey Arts, Sickness, Melting Slime, Whirlwind, Volatile Shell, Royal Finisher, Grounded Despair, Echo Incineration, Venom Spitter, Spore Burst, Apollo Boost, and HP gate thresholds.

nodes.name: perks.ts
nodes.summary: Perk constants for various mechanics: Luminescent, Spirit Winds, Dark Magic, Wind Walker (penetration), Reaper, Extinguish, Explosive Charge, Wild Bolt, Lightning Cloak, Curse Rip, True Balance, Emotional, Toxin Transfer, Void Rage, Channeled Weapon, Draconic Blood, crit damage base values (BASE_CRIT_DAMAGE=150), crit-rate multipliers (Flowing Crits, Spell Slinger, Sharp Crits, etc.), crit-damage formula multipliers (Thief Training, Venom Eater, Vital Strikes, Spark, Critical Master, Splinter), Mortal Will, and Sunburn mechanics.

nodes.name: rune-base-damage.ts
nodes.summary: Rune-triggered base damage constants: Ancient Cleric (with shield scaling), Beenade (with potency cap), Boostshroom, Thunderous Charge, Sporeling Toss (with slider max), Foot Dive, Caci, Cacitrops, Hex Web, Brainblast, and Rocky Tail (with protection scaling, variable hit count formula).

nodes.name: stat-conversions.ts
nodes.summary: Stat boost conversion rate constants: Weight Distribution, Quick Witted, Whirl Foot, Carapace, Extra Layers, Frozen Heart, Immovable, Righted Wrongs (with tenacity/offense weights), Rocky Body, Spellshield, Strong Tides, Swift Guard, True Balance, Rawny (with cap), and subtraction constants for Roaring Headings Warding, Lucky Warding/Protection/Tenacity.

nodes.name: buffs.ts
nodes.summary: Buff-related constants module (referenced by index.ts re-export but not in this batch).

nodes.name: storage.ts
nodes.summary: Defines localStorage key constants, default build state shape, save key mapping for compression, enchantment slot key mapping, and maximum build slots.

nodes.name: thresholds.ts
nodes.summary: Defines game mechanic threshold constants: armor pen branch threshold, CD minimum, and base crit damage percent.

nodes.name: Storage Config
nodes.summary: Aggregate storage configuration constants: keys, maps, and limits for build persistence.

nodes.name: Thresholds Config
nodes.summary: Game mechanic numerical thresholds used by the engine.

nodes.name: defense.ts
nodes.summary: Defense calculation module: resolves percent and flat defense sources into multipliers, computes damage type defense groupings, and calculates base armor defense percentage from stats.

nodes.name: calcDefMultiplier
nodes.summary: Calculates damage multiplier from a defense percentage using 1/(1+def) for positive and 1+|def| for negative.

nodes.name: calcTrueDrPercent
nodes.summary: Computes the true damage reduction percentage from a defense value.

nodes.name: resolveDefenseSources
nodes.summary: Resolves an array of DefenseSource objects into a DefenseBreakdown with percent/flat multipliers and final multiplier.

nodes.name: calcBaseArmorDefPct
nodes.summary: Sums relevant defense stats for a damage type based on the DEF_GROUP mapping.

nodes.name: EnchantSelect.svelte
nodes.summary: A searchable dropdown component for selecting enchantments, with color-coded options, keyboard navigation, scroll-aware positioning, and outside-click dismissal.

nodes.name: enchantTooltip.ts
nodes.summary: Generates formatted tooltip text for enchantments, pulling description, stat modifiers, effects, and additional notes from the engine data.

nodes.name: getEnchantTooltipText
nodes.summary: Returns a multi-line tooltip string for a given enchantment name, including description, stats, effects, and notes.

nodes.name: engine.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting all modules from engine/data, shrine, enchant, weapon, build, and format submodules.

nodes.name: engine
nodes.summary: Central engine barrel module aggregating data, shrine, enchant, weapon, build, and format functionality.

nodes.name: data.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting character, equipment, and weapons data modules.

nodes.name: engine/data
nodes.summary: Barrel module for game data: character stats, equipment definitions, and weapon definitions.

nodes.name: Modal.svelte
nodes.summary: Reusable modal dialog component with overlay backdrop, focus trapping, auto-focus on first focusable element, close button, and global modal-item CSS classes for list items.

nodes.name: trapFocus
nodes.summary: Keyboard event handler that traps Tab/Shift+Tab focus within the modal dialog.

nodes.name: focusOnOpen
nodes.summary: Module-level Svelte action that auto-focuses the first focusable element inside the modal on open.

nodes.name: AccessorySelectModal.svelte
nodes.summary: Modal for selecting armor accessories (helmet, chestplate, leggings), rings, runes, and infusions, with search, filtering, effective boost calculation, and Brawny conversion display.

nodes.name: select
nodes.summary: Updates the build store with the selected item name and closes the modal.

nodes.name: getItemStats
nodes.summary: Retrieves stats for an armor part, ring, or rune item.

nodes.name: getItemPerk
nodes.summary: Retrieves the perk name and amount from an armor part or item.

nodes.name: computeItemEffectiveBoost
nodes.summary: Computes the effective boost percentage for an item based on weapon scalings.

nodes.name: computeItemBrawnyBoost
nodes.summary: Computes effective boost assuming Brawny perk converts non-physical boosts to physical.

nodes.name: getItemDesc
nodes.summary: Retrieves description text for an armor part or item.

nodes.name: GuildModal.svelte
nodes.summary: Modal for selecting a guild and rank, with search filtering by guild name or perk name, rank selection buttons, and stat/perk display.

nodes.name: modals/index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting RaceModal, GuildModal, AccessorySelectModal, and WeaponPartModal Svelte components.

nodes.name: modals
nodes.summary: Barrel module exporting all modal components.

nodes.name: RaceModal.svelte
nodes.summary: Modal for selecting a race, with search filtering, stat modifier display, and passive description.

nodes.name: WeaponPartModal.svelte
nodes.summary: Modal for selecting weapon parts (blade, handle, glove, essence) with search, tag filtering, tier/type filters, stat display, and perk listing.

nodes.name: select
nodes.summary: Updates the build store with the selected weapon part name and closes the modal.

nodes.name: StatFilterShared.svelte
nodes.summary: Shared stat filter chip component with include/exclude/dimmed states, plus a module-level buildStatMaps helper for creating label/color maps from stat groups.

nodes.name: buildStatMaps
nodes.summary: Builds label and color lookup maps from an array of stat group definitions.

nodes.name: elementalBoosts.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the StatDef interface and constant arrays for elemental boost stats (dexterity, physical, magic, fire, water, earth, air, hex, holy, summon) and their negative variants.

nodes.name: filterActions.ts
nodes.summary: Provides a createFilterActions factory for managing include/exclude filter maps with toggle, remove, clear, and keyboard handler functions.

nodes.name: createFilterActions
nodes.summary: Factory that creates toggle, remove, clear, and handleChipKeyDown functions for a FilterMap state.

nodes.name: toast.ts
nodes.summary: Svelte writable store for toast notifications with addToast and removeToast functions, supporting success/error/info/warning types and auto-dismiss.

nodes.name: addToast
nodes.summary: Adds a toast notification to the store with auto-dismiss timeout.

nodes.name: removeToast
nodes.summary: Removes a toast notification by ID from the store.

nodes.name: Toast.svelte
nodes.summary: Toast notification container component that subscribes to the toast store, renders animated toast items with type-specific icons/colors, and allows manual dismissal.

nodes.name: Badge.svelte
nodes.summary: Versatile badge/tag component with variant colors (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal, muted, draco), sizes (xs/sm/md), square shape, solid fill, and monospace options.

nodes.name: Button.svelte
nodes.summary: Styled button component with variant colors (default, positive, negative, warning, info, neutral), sizes (sm/md/lg), active state, and disabled support.

nodes.name: Card.svelte
nodes.summary: Flexible card container component with variants (default, surface, ghost), hoverable behavior, accent color borders, configurable padding and gap, and click/keyboard handler.

nodes.name: Divider.svelte
nodes.summary: Horizontal rule divider component with color variants (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal, draco) and spacing options.

nodes.name: ui/index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting Card, Badge, Button, Stat, Section, Divider, and Panel UI components.

nodes.name: ui
nodes.summary: Barrel module for all UI components.

nodes.name: Panel.svelte
nodes.summary: Panel container component with gradient background, optional header snippet, color variants, and configurable padding.

nodes.name: Section.svelte
nodes.summary: Section container component with uppercase title header, color variants (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal, draco), and configurable gap.

nodes.name: Stat.svelte
nodes.summary: Reusable UI stat display component with label/value layout, color variants (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal), size options (sm, md, lg), and optional hover state. Renders children snippet or static value.

nodes.name: uiConstants.ts
nodes.summary: Constants file exporting UI_COLORS (hex color map for damage types, tag groups, source types, enchant rarities, negative stats), SOURCE_LABELS (display names for rune/perk/weaponArt/race/cantrip), and internal STAT_LABELS and TAG_LABELS maps.

nodes.name: main.ts
nodes.summary: Application entry point. Imports global CSS, mounts the Svelte App component to #app DOM element, and injects Vercel analytics.

nodes.name: ModalSearchHeader.svelte
nodes.summary: Reusable modal header component combining a title, search input with SuggestDrop autocomplete, optional TagFilter, optional StatFilter/WeaponStatFilter, and optional sort mode buttons (Highest/Most Effective/Brawny) for armor sorting. Dispatches select, toggle, clear, change, and weaponStatFilterChange events.

nodes.name: MountIcon.svelte
nodes.summary: Inline SVG icon component rendering a mount icon with a blue-to-cyan linear gradient. Accepts a size prop.

nodes.name: ScalingBreakdownRow.svelte
nodes.summary: Renders a single row in the damage scaling breakdown table showing damage type dot, scaling value Ă— boost percentage = contribution percentage. Uses roundMultiplier utility and PERCENT_STATS to determine formatting.

nodes.name: StatFilter.svelte
nodes.summary: Collapsible stat filter panel with positive/negative stat tabs, include/exclude toggle states, and sort modes (highest/lowest/alphabetical). Defines stat groups for boosts, defenses, and utilities. Uses StatChip, createFilterActions, and dispatches change events with filter map and sort mode.

nodes.name: SuggestDrop.svelte
nodes.summary: Dropdown suggestion list for search autocomplete. Displays name or perk suggestions with highlighted text matching the query. Dispatches select events on mousedown.

nodes.name: TagFilter.svelte
nodes.summary: Collapsible tag filter panel with grouped tag chips (Combat, Support, Status, Weapon Art/Rune, Special). Supports selectedTags set, hideTags exclusion, expand/collapse, and dispatches toggle/change/clear events. Shows active tag summary chips in the bar header.

nodes.name: WeaponStatFilter.svelte
nodes.summary: Collapsible weapon-specific stat filter panel with three groups: Damage Type, Scaling, and Boost/Stats. Uses include/exclude toggle states, StatChip components with tag prefixes (DMG/SCL/STAT), and exposes a matchesFilter method for programmatic filtering. Dispatches change events.

nodes.name: WeaponStatsDisplay.svelte
nodes.summary: Displays weapon statistics split into three groups: damage types (Ă—multiplier), scalings (flat values), and boost/defense stats (percentage). Each stat rendered as a colored pill badge.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration. Configures Svelte plugin, VitePWA with auto-update registration, workbox caching (stale-while-revalidate for navigation), and optional base path via VITE_BASE_PATH env var. Uses PWA manifest for voxlblade builder.

layers.name: Entry & Build Config
layers.description: Root configuration files, build tooling, HTML entry point, application bootstrap, global styles, and dead-code analysis outputs. These files define how the project is built, deployed, and initialized.

layers.name: UI Components
layers.description: Svelte components for rendering the application interface. Includes the large application-level views (DamageAnalyzer, BaseDamageCalc, BuffList), modal dialogs (Race, Guild, Weapon Part, Accessory), reusable primitive components (Badge, Button, Card, Panel, Section, Stat, Divider), and filter/search UI (StatFilter, TagFilter, SuggestDrop, ModalSearchHeader).

layers.name: Game Data
layers.description: Game mechanic data definitions: weapon base damage, weapon arts, perk damage formulas, defensive perks, debuff combat effects, DoT damage calculations, proc coefficients, draconic color effects and runes, race effects, CDR perks, enemy HP effects, mount runes, stance overlays, and weapon conditional boosts. Each module defines data structures and computation functions for a specific game subsystem.

layers.name: Calculation Engine
layers.description: Core damage calculation pipeline: barrel export hub (engine.ts), character/equipment/weapon data assembly (engine/data.ts), and defense computation (defense.ts). This layer orchestrates the aggregation of game data, constants, and build state into final damage numbers.

layers.name: Constants & Configuration
layers.description: Numerical constants and configuration values used throughout the calculation engine and UI: damage types and inheritance, game core values (HP, level caps), perk crit/boost/defensive constants, DoT scaling, draconic multipliers, CDR values, stat conversions, storage keys, thresholds, and UI color/label mappings.

layers.name: Utilities & Stores
layers.description: Shared utility functions, state management stores, and standalone tools. Includes the toast notification store, enchantment tooltip generation, elemental boost type definitions, filter action factories, and the standalone offline build decoder debug tool.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project documentation: agent context file (AGENTS.md), README with setup instructions, and comprehensive onboarding guide covering architecture, concepts, and guided tour of the codebase.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README and package.json to understand the project's purpose as a Voxel Blade damage calculator, its tech stack (Svelte 5 + Vite + TypeScript), and development workflow.

tour.title: Application Entry Point
tour.description: See how the frontend boots: index.html loads main.ts, which imports global styles and mounts the root App.svelte component.

tour.title: UI Component Architecture
tour.description: Explore the reusable UI primitives (Badge, Button, Card, Panel) and layout components (AppHeader, Modal) that form the foundation of the interface.

tour.title: Game Data Definitions
tour.description: Examine the game data modules that define weapon arts, perk damage formulas, base weapon damage, and other RPG mechanics used throughout the calculator.

tour.title: Calculation Engine
tour.description: Understand the core damage calculation pipeline: engine.ts re-exports all calculation modules, while defense.ts handles armor and damage reduction logic.

tour.title: Constants & Configuration
tour.description: Review the centralized constants that drive the engine: damage types, game mechanics (HP, level caps), perk multipliers, and storage keys.

tour.title: State Management & Utilities
tour.description: Learn how application state is managed (toast notifications, build saves) and how utility functions like enchantment tooltips are generated.

tour.title: Damage Analysis Pipeline
tour.description: Follow the main damage calculation flow: DamageAnalyzer assembles buffs and computes full damage, BaseDamageCalc displays per-hit breakdowns, and BuffList shows active effects.
